overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in period clothing exploring a historic New Orleans-style city. The character walks down wet cobblestone streets with tram tracks, enters a narrow alleyway through a metal gate, and explores a lush inner courtyard with brick archways and staircases. The atmosphere is moody and overcast with atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with tram tracks and cast iron balconies

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the wet cobblestone street between rows of historic buildings with balconies

notable_agents.action: woman in dress standing near building entrance watching the street

entered.detail: multi-story brick buildings with wrought iron balconies and tall windows
row of connected historic structures with ground floor storefronts
metal tram rails embedded in the wet cobblestone street surface
crisscrossing electrical wires and cables spanning the street above
ornate black wrought iron railings on second floor of buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wide, wet cobblestone street lined with historic brick buildings featuring cast iron balconies. Tram tracks run down the center of the road beneath a canopy of overhead wires, while a few pedestrians stand near the building entrances in the atmospheric dusk light.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between brick buildings

events.description: character turns left off the main street and enters a narrow alleyway through a metal gate

agents.ego_description: turning left and passing through a metal gate into a narrow enclosed alley with brick walls

entered.detail: black iron gate that opens to allow entry into the alleyway
tall weathered brick walls forming the narrow passage
large tropical plants with bright red leaves growing in the alley

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the open street to a narrow, enclosed alleyway as the character passes through a metal gate. The space is flanked by tall brick walls and features exotic red plants, with significantly darker lighting and an intimate, confined atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with brick archways and lush potted vegetation

events.description: emerges from the narrow alley into a courtyard with brick archways and tropical plants
character passes through a brick archway into a more open courtyard area

agents.ego_description: walking through a series of brick archways in a quiet courtyard filled with potted palms and flowering plants

entered.detail: weathered brick arch forming a passage between courtyard sections
circular stone fountain basin in the center of the courtyard
small wooden structure with sloped roof in the courtyard corner
tropical palm trees in large planters lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character explores a tranquil courtyard featuring brick archways, a central stone fountain, and dense tropical vegetation in large pots. The space feels like a hidden garden with wet cobblestones and weathered brick walls, transitioning through archways into progressively more open areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner courtyard with white staircases and residential balconies

events.description: enters an inner courtyard featuring white-railed staircases and multi-level balconies
character slows to a stop and looks around the courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking into an inner courtyard with white stairs and balconies, then stopping to observe the surroundings and look up at the upper levels

notable_agents.action: figure standing on upper balcony overlooking the courtyard

entered.detail: elegant white painted staircase with ornate railings leading to upper floors
white railed balconies on second and third floors of the surrounding buildings
circular fountain basin with stone rim in the middle of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character enters an inner residential courtyard dominated by white-railed staircases and balconies. The space features a central fountain and potted plants, with a figure visible on an upper balcony. The character stops to survey the area, taking in the multi-level architecture and quiet atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, atmospheric city street into the secluded depths of a multi-level residential courtyard. It begins by following a character down a wet cobblestone road lined with cast iron balconies and tram tracks under a canopy of overhead wires in the dim dusk light. As the character passes through a metal gate, the open street gives way to a narrow, enclosed alleyway flanked by tall brick walls and exotic red plants. The scene then expands into a tranquil hidden garden featuring brick archways, a stone fountain, and dense tropical vegetation before shifting further inward. Finally, the camera enters a residential courtyard dominated by white-railed staircases and balconies, where the character stops to survey the quiet, multi-level architecture.
